params.query:
DELETE FROM `data-etl-to-bigquery.ctm_data.activities_data` WHERE DATE(called_at) >= CURRENT_DATE - 90 OR called_at IS NULL;
INSERT INTO `data-etl-to-bigquery.ctm_data.activities_data` SELECT * FROM `data-etl-to-bigquery.ctm_data.activities_combined_lookback_candidate_90d` WHERE DATE(called_at) >= CURRENT_DATE - 90 OR called_at IS NULL
